headline: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
description: Certification for designing scalable, highly available, and cost-efficient cloud architectures on the AWS platform. Validates expertise in distributed systems, security, and cloud best practices.

headline: Master of Engineering (M.Eng.), Systems Engineering
description: Interdisciplinary master’s program focusing on complex technical systems, system architecture, modeling, and usability engineering. Specialized in embedded systems and human-machine interaction.

headline: Bachelor of Engineering (B.Eng.), Computer Engineering
description: Combined computer science and electrical engineering curriculum, with a focus on embedded systems, hardware design, programming, and digital circuit technology.
